input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IN.5.3 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: in.5.3
            TITLE: driver clearance and egress test completion

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5.3: Driver Clearance and Egress Test Completion
IN.5.3 Driver Clearance and Egress Test Completion

RULE: in.5.3.1
            TITLE: to drive the vehicle, each team driver must:

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5.3.1: To drive the vehicle, each team driver must:
IN.5.3.1 To drive the vehicle, each team driver must: 
a. Meet the Driver Clearance requirements  IN.5.1  
b. Successfully complete the Egress Test  IN.5.2

RULE: in.5.3.2
            TITLE: a driver(s) must complete the driver cockpit checks to pass mechanical inspection

            CONTENT:
            rule IN.5.3.2: A driver(s) must complete the Driver Cockpit Checks to pass Mechanical Inspection
IN.5.3.2 A driver(s) must complete the Driver Cockpit Checks to pass Mechanical Inspection
